auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your vendor account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.requestFailed: Could not send the request. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for {email}, we sent instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.spamHint: Check your spam or junk folder if you don't see the message.

activateAccount.title: Activate your account
activateAccount.subtitle: Set a new password to finish activation and sign in.
activateAccount.missingTokenDescription: This page needs a valid token from your invitation email. Check the link or request a new invitation.
activateAccount.errorFallback: Activation failed. Please try again or contact support.

auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! You can now sign in.
auth.activateAccountSuccess: Your account is active! You can now sign in.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.
auth.resetLinkSentInfo: If an account exists for that email, check your inbox for a link to reset your password.

register.title: Create New Account
register.description: Enter your details to create a new account

validation.contactRequired: At least one contact is required: provide email and/or phone number.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.invalidVin: VIN must be exactly 17 characters (letters and numbers, no I, O, or Q)
validation.invalidYear: Enter a valid year between 1980 and 2035

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.ordersIntro: Delivery shipment requests and their current status (excluding drafts still being edited).
dashboard.pickupOrdersIntro: Pickup shipment requests and their current status (excluding drafts still being edited).
dashboard.pickupCartIntro: Pickup requests currently in cart before they are submitted.
dashboard.emailInboxIntro: Review parsed customer emails and turn suggestions into cart actions.
dashboard.emailInboxAlert: Parsing runs automatically when messages arrive. Always confirm customer, vehicle, and appointment details before approving.
dashboard.emailInboxLoadError: Could not load inbound emails. Showing sample data for now.
dashboard.emailInboxRejectMissingRequest: This email is not linked to a shipment request yet.
dashboard.emailInboxApproveCartError: Could not add this suggestion to the cart.
dashboard.emailInboxRejectModalDescription: The suggestion will be marked as rejected and removed from your inbox. No warehouse order will be created. You can still add this customer manually via the Delivery Cart.
dashboard.sessionsIntro: Manage handover and pre-shipment scan sessions

deliveryOrders.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer or order ID...
deliveryOrders.actionSoon: This action will be available soon.
deliveryOrders.handoverOpenSuccess: Handover session opened. Continue on the mobile app.
deliveryOrders.handoverCloseConflictDescription: Closing was refused: not all tires have been scanned yet, or some scans do not match the expected items. Finish scanning on the mobile app, resolve any discrepancies, then try closing again.
deliveryOrders.handoverCloseMissingSessionTitle: No handover session linked to this order
deliveryOrders.handoverCloseMissingSessionDescription: handoverSessionId is missing for this order. Refresh the page or convert to handover again, then try Close Session.
deliveryOrders.handoverCloseMissingVersionDescription: The orders list did not return a version for this row. Refresh the page and ensure GET /v1/dealer/shipment-requests includes version on each item.
deliveryOrders.handoverCloseConfirmDescription: All tires must be scanned with no discrepancies before closing. Close session for order {orderId}?
deliveryOrders.selectAllConfirmed: Select all confirmed orders on this page
deliveryOrders.handoverBulkConfirmDescription: A single handover session will be opened for all selected confirmed orders. Continue scanning on the mobile app.
deliveryOrders.handoverBulkOpenSuccess: Handover session opened for {count} orders. Continue on the mobile app.
deliveryOrders.handoverBulkMixedDirection: Selected orders must share the same direction (delivery or pickup).
deliveryOrders.empty: No delivery orders match your filters.
deliveryOrders.noSetDetails: Detailed tire set lines will appear here when the API includes them.
deliveryOrders.detailError: Could not load tire sets for this order.

deliveryCart.title: Delivery Cart
deliveryCart.intro: Add delivery requests manually and convert them to orders
deliveryCart.warningBody: Cart must be submitted at least 1 week AND 48 hours before the appointment date. Late submissions will be blocked.
deliveryCart.convertModalSubtitle: Confirm the details below before creating the order
deliveryCart.summaryTireSetsCount: {count, plural, one {# tire set} other {# tire sets}}
deliveryCart.convertExcludeNote: {count, plural, one {Note: # item has an expired time window and will be excluded from this order.} other {Note: # items have an expired time window and will be excluded from this order.}}
deliveryCart.actionSoon: This action will be available soon.
deliveryCart.tireSetsHintSelectVehicle: Select a vehicle to list tire sets.
deliveryCart.appointmentInfo: Appointment: {date} | Deadline to submit: {deadline} (1 week before)
deliveryCart.windowOkInfo: Window OK — You have {days} days to submit
deliveryCart.windowExpiredInfo: Window Expired — Submission deadline has passed
deliveryCart.addItemError: Failed to add item to cart
deliveryCart.submitAllConfirmDescription: {count, plural, one {# item is ready to submit. Items with an expired time window will be skipped by the server.} other {# items are ready to submit. Items with an expired time window will be skipped by the server.}}

pickupCart.addItemValidation: Please select customer, vehicle, and tire set

combinePickup.title: Suggested pickups
combinePickup.subtitle: Tire sets that fall within this delivery's service window. Combine them to ship together and save trips.
combinePickup.bannerBody: These pickups are scheduled between the last completed shipment and the next upcoming one. Selected sets will travel together with this delivery in one route.
combinePickup.nextStepHintBody: After saving, you'll see pickups in the same time window so you can add them to this trip.
combinePickup.countAvailable: {count, plural, one {# tire set available} other {# tire sets available}}
combinePickup.empty: No combinable pickups in this window
combinePickup.emptyHint: There aren't any pickup requests scheduled near this delivery. You can still close and continue.
combinePickup.footerSelectionSets: {sets, plural, one {# set selected} other {# sets selected}} · {tires, plural, one {# tire} other {# tires}}
combinePickup.footerNoSelection: Select tire sets to combine, or skip.
combinePickup.confirmCombineSets: Combine {count, plural, one {# set} other {# sets}} with delivery
combinePickup.successCombined: Combined {count, plural, one {# tire set} other {# tire sets}} with this delivery.
combinePickup.errorCombining: Failed to combine pickups. Please try again.

pickupOrders.empty: No pickup cart items match your filters.
pickupOrders.emptyOrders: No pickup orders match your filters.

staff.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this staff account? This cannot be undone.
staff.disableConfirm: Disable this staff account? The user will not be able to sign in.

customers.addCustomerSubtitle: Fill in the customer details below.
customers.addressOptionsError: Could not load options. Try again.
customers.notesPlaceholder: Any special notes about this customer...
customers.addVehicleSubtitle: Create a new vehicle for this customer.
customers.addTireSetModalDescription: Add a new tire set to this vehicle.
customers.tireSetDetailNoTiresInSet: No tires in this set yet.
customers.invalidPageParameters: This page address is invalid or incomplete.
customers.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this customer? This cannot be undone.
customers.deleteVehicleConfirm: Delete this vehicle? This cannot be undone.
customers.archiveConfirmSubtitle: Are you sure you want to archive this customer?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.securitySectionHint: Keep your account secure with a strong password.
settings.changePasswordModalDescription: Enter your current password, then your new password twice.

quota.blockedStaff: Adding new staff is blocked. Upgrade your plan or remove inactive staff to free up slots.
quota.blockedTires: New tire storage is blocked. Upgrade your plan or retrieve stored tires to free up space.
quota.blockedRole: Adding {role} is blocked. Upgrade your plan to increase this role's limit.
quota.blockedSubscription: Your subscription is inactive. Renew it to resume adding staff and storing tires.
quota.noActiveSubscription: Your subscription is not active. You cannot add staff or store more tires until it is renewed.
quota.staffLimitReached: Staff limit reached: {current}/{max} active. {remaining} slot(s) left on your plan — role limits may still block new hires.
quota.tireLimitReached: Tire storage limit reached: {current}/{max} stored. {remaining} slot(s) remaining on your plan.
quota.roleLimitReached: Cannot add {role}: {current}/{max} used. {remaining} slot(s) left for this role on your plan.
quota.tiresInsufficientSlots: This set needs {requested} tire slot(s) but only {remaining} remain (plan max {max}). Reduce tire count or free storage.

common.formError: An error occurred, please try again.
